rationale: Project health improvements: adds `lint:md` npm script invoking `npx --yes markdownlint-cli2` in package.json, wires it as a CI step in .github/workflows/deploy-github-pages.yml (`Markdown lint` step running `npm run lint:md`), adds `pull_request` trigger for the deploy workflow while gating the actual `deploy` job with `if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'` so PRs build/lint without trying to publish. Also adds `.vscode/extensions.json` recommending `DavidAnson.vscode-markdownlint` and configures `markdownlint.cli2ConfigFile` / `markdownlint.run: onSave` in `.vscode/settings.json`. All changes match the stated goal of aligning IDE markdownlint with CLI2 config and skipping the protected deploy environment on PRs.
